message:
feat(ready): add --parent and --recursive flags for scoped issue filtering

Allows filtering the ready queue to only show children (or all descendants)
of a specific parent issue, which is essential for working within epics.

Detailed changes:

- src/cli/mod.rs: Add --parent <ID> and --recursive/-r arguments to ReadyArgs
  with shell completion support via issue_id_completer.

- src/cli/commands/ready.rs: Wire the new args into ReadyFilters so the
  storage layer receives parent/recursive context.

- src/storage/sqlite.rs:
  - ReadyFilters struct gains parent: Option<String> and recursive: bool fields.
  - get_ready_issues() uses a CTE (WITH RECURSIVE descendants) when --recursive
    is set, or a simple subquery on the dependencies table for direct children.
  - New get_blockers() method that reads blocked_by JSON from the
    blocked_issues_cache table and extracts clean issue IDs (stripping status
    annotations like ":open"). This replaces the misleading get_dependencies()
    call in the update command's block-check path.
  - Fix SQL injection vector in find_ids_by_hash() and next_child_number():
    both now use ESCAPE '\\' with a proper escape_like_pattern() call so that
    user-supplied issue IDs containing SQL LIKE wildcards (%, _) are treated
    as literals.

- src/cli/commands/update.rs: Switch from get_dependencies() to get_blockers()
  when checking whether an issue can transition to in_progress, and improve
  the error message to say "blocking dependencies" instead of generic
  "dependencies".

- Comprehensive test (test_get_ready_issues_filters_by_parent) covering:
  direct children only, recursive descendants, and non-existent parent edge
  case with a realistic epic/child/grandchild hierarchy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1911,6 +1911,14 @@ pub struct ReadyArgs {
     #[arg(long)]
     pub include_deferred: bool,
 
+    /// Filter to children of this parent issue ID
+    #[arg(long, add = ArgValueCompleter::new(issue_id_completer))]
+    pub parent: Option<String>,
+
+    /// Include all descendants (grandchildren, etc.) with --parent
+    #[arg(long, short = 'r')]
+    pub recursive: bool,
+
     /// Wrap long lines instead of truncating in text output
     #[arg(long)]
     pub wrap: bool,
